meta.name: Magneta Layer 1 ownership migration — base
meta.description: Sentinelle config-drift scanner finding remediation 2026-06-08. Completes the Ownable2Step second leg for base: Safe accepts ownership of Gateway (0x852976d4c837824e53357E84e851ce0C5A1092ff), LPModule (0x9003cEe70616B07e184FB4bC39a54A4694FC1642), and TokenOpsModule (0xb234B37211f2c5653501FA42936b0729c49a0eB7). Eliminates single-key risk on base's Layer 1 ops (LP / MINT / FREEZE) — they were previously deployer-EOA-owned out of step with the other 17 mainnet chains. Sign with Safe 0xC4c96aF54cdE078dc993d6948199b0AF8cD6717a.
